my_thoughts: Four turns brought to paradox. T1-T3 deconstructed separation/innocence/doctrine. T4 asks: now what? 'What about responsibility?' My navigates_paradox: both/neither. Live the contradiction. This is the mature teaching—no resolution, just skillful action within unsolvable. Who acts? Who resolves?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in frustrated_insiste... Deepening with causal_chain in response to ethical_dissonance, seeking_moral_rule. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
In our ignorance we are innocent; in our actions we are guilty.
We sin without knowing and suffer without understanding. Our only hope: to stop, to look, to understand and to get out of the traps of memory.
For memory feeds imagination and imagination generates desire and fear.
